title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0242
summary: On 6 March 2022, the complainant and a friend were diverted by an auto-rickshaw driven by the accused to a different location in Pune, where two rear passengers threatened them with a knife and robbed them of mobile phones, cash, and PhonePe transfers. The applicant was arrested on 9 March 2022 a...
